Title: Long LatAm vs Short Japan
Trade_Description: Establish a relative-value pair trade: go long LatAm equity or FX exposure and short Japan exposure based on the composite ranking.

Title: Long LatAm Growth vs Neutral Market
Trade_Description: Use LatAm equities, FX, or commodity-linked exposure to capture the region's strongest pillar; the top driver is Earnings.

Title: Directional Trade: LatAm over Japan
Trade_Description: If LatAm remains the strongest region, consider an overweight in LatAm and an underweight in Japan across the same asset class (e.g. equities or FX).
